name: Pineapple Sorbet
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine sugar and water. Stir well and bring to a boil.
2. Cover and simmer for 5 minutes. Uncover, remove from heat, and set aside.
3. Cut the pineapple into 1-inch chunks. Measure about 2 cups of chopped pineapple.
4. Puree the pineapple chunks in a food processor fitted with a steel blade until smooth, about 45 seconds.
5. With the machine running, pour in half of the hot syrup within 15 seconds. Process for another 30 seconds.
6. Transfer the puree to a mixing bowl. Repeat with the remaining pineapple and the remaining sugar syrup. Combine all the puree.
7. Stir in the lemon juice and vodka.
8. Divide the pineapple mixture evenly between two shallow baking pans. Cover and freeze until half frozen.
9. Process each batch of partially frozen sorbet mixture in the food processor for 1 minute, stopping once to scrape down the sides. Return to the pans and cover. Freeze until firm but not completely solid (3/4 firm).
10. Process each batch again for 1 minute. Return to the freezer and freeze until the sorbet is 3/4 firm.
11. Process one more time for 2 minutes. Pack into an airtight container and freeze until firm enough to scoop or spoon, about 4 to 6 hours.
